Future of PMM
Home Curriculum Digests Newsletter
Learning Curriculum

The Future of Product Marketing

From the Pragmatic Framework to the Agentic Funnel. 8 chapters that rewire how PMMs think about markets, products, and customers.

How to Use This Curriculum

This curriculum maps every activity in the Pragmatic Institute's 37-box framework to stages of the modern B2B funnel — reframed for the agentic era.

Chapter 1 establishes the new reality. Chapters 2–7 walk the funnel from awareness to advocacy. Chapter 8 brings it all together into a personal operating system.

The goal isn't to teach AI as a productivity hack. It's to help you understand how the playbook itself has been rewritten — and equip you to operate in the world that replaced it.

1
Foundational · All Stages
The Old Playbook Is Dead
The agentic era didn't accelerate the old B2B playbook — it ended it. Three eras of enterprise data, the visibility gap, and why 37 boxes still matter.
Available
2
Awareness · TOFU
Building Signal in a Noisy World
Awareness is no longer about impressions — it's about appearing in the right context when an AI agent assembles an answer. From SEO to GEO.
Coming Soon
3
Consideration · MOFU
Winning the Evaluation You Never See
The buyer's consideration phase happens inside AI agents and tools you don't control. Ensure your product shows up when agents answer "what should we evaluate?"
Coming Soon
4
Decision · BOFU
Closing in the Age of the Informed Buyer
By the time buyers reach decision stage, they've formed opinions from AI research you didn't shape. Pricing for post-SaaS economics.
Coming Soon
5
Onboarding · Post-Sale
Time-to-Value Is the Only Metric
In the agentic era, onboarding IS the product marketing moment. A customer who doesn't activate will have their AI recommend a competitor before the first QBR.
Coming Soon
6
Retention · NRR
The Revenue You Already Have
Net revenue retention is the defining metric. When switching costs drop because AI makes migration trivial, make the relationship irreplaceable through value.
Coming Soon
7
Advocacy · Flywheel
Your Customers Are Your Content Engine
AI agents weigh peer evidence more than vendor claims. Customer stories are training data for the agents that recommend you.
Coming Soon
8
Capstone · All Stages
The 10x PMM Operating System
Design your personal AI-augmented PMM operating system. The 10x PMM isn't the one with the best prompts — it's the one who rewired how they think.
Coming Soon

Appendices

A: Pragmatic 37 → Funnel Mapping

Complete reference table mapping all 37 activities to funnel stages with agentic-era notes.

B: AI Tools Reference

Detailed evaluation of recommended AI tools by category with SAP governance tiers.

C: GEO Playbook

Comprehensive guide to generative engine optimization and agent recommendation auditing.

D: 10x PMM Scorecard

Interactive self-assessment across 10 dimensions with benchmarking guidance.

E: Glossary

Definitions for GEO, AMP, agentic workflows, consumption pricing, and more.

The Future of Product Marketing · futureofpmm.com · Chris O'Hara & Dan Yu
